escalation_rule: escalate if exact bytecode hash in frozen conflict set
interpretation: All 23 conflicting exact-bytecode groups are already quarantined from the primary task, so the retained corpus contains 0 of them; the deterministic known-conflict escalation rule therefore escalates 0% of retained decisions while, by construction, routing 100% of the known-ambiguous exact bytecodes to human/deeper analysis. This rule is a zero-false-abstention safety net for previously-seen conflicts; it does not generalize to unseen ambiguous bytecodes (that is Gate B's role).
before_after_quarantine_sensitivity_poin: paper_build/data_hygiene/original_vs_task_aligned.md and revision_v2 G-DET v2 vs frozen v1: AuthGuard family AUPRC 0.856 (pre-quarantine original cohort) -> 0.881 (post-quarantine task-aligned); quarantine did not inflate the headline.
